description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear. The simple design and earthy coloured straps look perfect when teamed with casuals. Upper T-strap made of earth tone leather panels with heavy stitch detailing and wooden beads for snug Fit and great visual appeal Soft lining for added style Fabric lined footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added style Heel for ergonomic comfort Footbed stitched to the outsole for durability Outsole TPU outsole with heel Grooved pattern on the forefoot and heel for added comfort shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
